queries.question: Show both central and commercial banks based in the UK.
queries.sql:
SELECT Banks.Name 
FROM Banks
WHERE (Banks.types_of_bank = "Central Bank" OR Banks.types_of_bank = "Commercial Bank") AND Banks.country = "UK"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?banks a :Banks .
  ?banks p:name ?name .
  ?banks p:types_of_bank ?types_of_bank_w .
  ?banks p:types_of_bank ?types_of_bank_w2 .
  ?banks p:country ?country_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?types_of_bank_w) = "Central Bank" || STR(?types_of_bank_w2) = "Commercial Bank")) && STR(?country_w) = "UK"))
}

queries.question: Show me all central banks and commercial banks in the UK.
queries.sql:
SELECT Banks.Name 
FROM Banks
WHERE Banks.types_of_bank = "Central Bank" OR Banks.types_of_bank = "Commercial Bank" AND Banks.country = "UK"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?banks a :Banks .
  ?banks p:name ?name .
  ?banks p:types_of_bank ?types_of_bank_w .
  ?banks p:types_of_bank ?types_of_bank_w2 .
  ?banks p:country ?country_w .
  FILTER((STR(?types_of_bank_w) = "Central Bank" || (STR(?types_of_bank_w2) = "Commercial Bank" && STR(?country_w) = "UK")))
}
